item.title: hiyouga/LlamaFactory
item.description: Unified Efficient Fine-Tuning of 100+ LLMs & VLMs (ACL 2024)

item.title: unslothai/unsloth
item.description: Unsloth Studio is a web UI for training and running open models like Gemma 4, Qwen3.6, DeepSeek, gpt-oss locally.

item.title: labmlai/annotated_deep_learning_paper_implementations
item.description: 🧑‍🏫 60+ Implementations/tutorials of deep learning papers with side-by-side notes 📝; including transformers (original, xl, switch, feedback, vit, ...), optimizers (adam, adabelief, sophia, ...), gans(

item.title: MakazhanAlpamys/Soup
item.description: Soup turns the pain of LLM fine-tuning into a simple workflow. One config, one command, done.

item.title: anote-ai/Panacea

item.title: arduino-libraries/MKRWAN
item.description: An Arduino library for sending and receiving data using LoRaWAN protocol and LoRa® radios.

item.title: kubeflow/sdk
item.description: Universal Python SDK to run AI workloads on Kubernetes
